# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing


apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: LinkerdServer
metadata:
  name: linkerd-server
spec:
  cluster:
    enabled: true

---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-authorization
spec:
  rules:
  - action: allow
    from:
      serviceAccountSelectors:
        - matchExpressions:
            - key: io.k8s.sigs.auth-providers.google.serviceaccount
              operator: Exists
          namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/control-plane-ns: default
    to:
      portSelectors:
        - port: 80
          protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-authorization
spec:
  rules:
  - action: allow
    from:
      serviceAccountSelectors:
        - matchExpressions:
            - key: io.k8s.sigs.auth-providers.google.serviceaccount
              operator: Exists
          namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/control-plane-ns: default
    to:
      serviceSelectors:
        - matchLabels:
            app: microservice1

      serviceAccountSelectors:
        - matchExpressions:
            - key: io.k8s.sigs.auth-providers.google.serviceaccount
              operator: Exists

---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-authorization
spec:
  rules:
  - action: allow
    from:
      serviceAccountSelectors:
        - matchExpressions:
            - key: io.k8s.sigs.auth-providers.google.serviceaccount
              operator: Exists
          namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/control-plane-ns: default
    to:
      serviceSelectors:
        - matchLabels:
            app: microservice28

---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-authorization
spec:
  rules:
  - action: allow
    from:
      portSelectors:
        - port: 80
          protocol: TCP
    to:
      serviceAccountSelectors:
        - matchExpressions:
            - key: io.k8s.sigs.auth-providers.google.serviceaccount
              operator: Exists

  - action: allow
    from:

            - key: io.k8s.sigs.auth-providers.google.serviceaccount
